CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT, numeric_a FLOAT, numeric_b FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (6, null, null);
SELECT sys.corr(numeric_a, numeric_b) FROM (SELECT numeric_a, numeric_b FROM t1 WHERE numeric_a IS NOT NULL AND numeric_b IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT sys.corr(t1.numeric_a, t2.value) FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.value;
SELECT sys.corr(numeric_a, numeric_b) FROM t1 WHERE numeric_a > 1.5 AND numeric_b < 5.0;
SELECT sys.corr(numeric_a, numeric_b) FROM t1 WHERE NOT (numeric_a IS NULL OR numeric_b IS NULL);
SELECT sys.corr(numeric_a, numeric_b) FROM t1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM t1 WHERE numeric_a < 5.0);
SELECT sys.corr(numeric_a, numeric_b) FROM (SELECT numeric_a, numeric_b FROM t1 WHERE numeric_a BETWEEN 0 AND 10) AS filtered;
SELECT sys.corr(numeric_a, numeric_b) FROM (SELECT numeric_a, numeric_b FROM t1 WHERE numeric_a IS NOT NULL) AS temp;
